caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" printed in white and grey across the chest speaks into a professional black microphone. He is seated in a room decorated with several framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. To the right of the mannequin, a clothing rack is visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular logo containing the text "SOSS" on the left and a red script logo reading "SOSS" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head and shoulders while maintaining his position in front of the microphone.
